epic.priority: bdo's arc, named 2026-06-15 (chat: 'I want ontum to be the new digital experience… it's like a 20-year goal') and recorded here so sessions inherit it from the record, not from chat (his standing rule). It is a COMPOSING arc: it does not re-build the fold (loop/reconcile.py), the citation/ghost discipline (causality/term_economy.py), the Causality surface (epic.causality-surface), the inference plane (epic.inference-gateway), the agenda/anima layer (epic.the-field), or gaps/temporal — it points them at a person's own data and adds only what none of them covers. Where a piece below overlaps an existing epic, its glue cites that piece and refuses to double-build (§10). Its desired-reality pole is outcomes/digital-experience.md.
epic.arc: ontum moves from being a substrate that models its own work to a control plane for a person's whole digital world. The same machinery this repo already runs — a tree of bounded, composing, AI-native directories with an orchestrator at the root — is pointed at any machine's existing data. A skill plus the Pattern Commons FOLDS over that data (read-only, re-derivable, local-first) and re-derives the person's world as a holographic, evidence-cited knowledge graph: a tree of bounded runs, each carrying declared purpose (mission/vision/values), declared anima (expected rhythm), a control surface, and gestures. Reality is folded; purpose is declared and never inferred; their tension produces the agenda; an orchestration run at the root holds cross-bound balance against a declared allocation only. The system anticipates — pre-staging reversible surfaces from inferred context autonomously, gating every irreversible act behind a gesture.
epic.context: Born from the 2026-06-15 working session that started from 'an always-on local AI-native voice transcriber with desktop access' and converged, over six turns, on the architecture above. The load-bearing reframes, in bdo's words: it is a FOLD over data that already exists ('the information ALREADY exists on my computer'); the apparent value-paradox (40h games vs building a company) is not a paradox but THREE BOUNDED RUNS each with its own setpoint, so 'every directory and file inside my digital world can be AI-native'; mission/vision/values DECIDE the agenda/arcs/Pattern Commons and are declared, never folded. The teeth (causality's, reused): the loop's fold is byte-deterministic, but a fold over a raw machine is INFERENCE — so every inferred node cites the byte it came from or it is a ghost; the inference may be fuzzy, the citation may not. The control shape (named via the loops skill): MAPE-K, where the K (Knowledge base) that braids iterations IS the append-only log — loop N writes a receipt, loop N+1's Monitor folds over the log including it, so the connection is sound (re-derivable, not session-memory). Setpoint = the outcome's probe-set; error = unresolved probes + gaps; brake = stop-on-converged-or-stuck.
epic.value: A person gets one world instead of many, one control plane instead of a hundred skills to tend — a governed map of their digital life so they live in the physical one. Because it is a fold over what already exists, it is a projection of what is already theirs, not a new authority and not a new dossier. The second-order-control thesis becomes literal: the person declares the why (the setpoint), and the controller — the agenda — assembles itself from the fold. The first vertical slice proves the whole thesis (sensor → cited fold → proposed bounded run → reversible pre-stage → graded by adoption) without requiring the whole world.
epic.horizon: ontum is a person's control plane to the digital world. Its definition of done (bdo's, in intent): a fold re-derives a machine's data as an evidence-cited knowledge graph; the world reads as bounded runs each with declared purpose, anima, and control surface; purpose is declared and never inferred; the agenda assembles itself from the tension; an orchestration run holds cross-bound balance against a declared allocation; the system pre-stages reversible surfaces autonomously and gates irreversible acts behind a gesture; every inferred node cites its source byte; and the thing reduces the person's surface rather than adding one. This is a ~20-year horizon, carried not met. The first increment is the loop that braids itself.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the first increment; the loop that braids itself
pieces.glue: The sound braid (MAPE-K Plan over the log as K). A deterministic Plan step derives the next done-line from the live fold (state → next work) and connects iterations through the append-only log, not session memory. DO NOT double-build (§10): the Monitor is loop/reconcile.py's Fold, the Analyze is loop/temporal.py + loop/gaps.py (the ranked pressure field and leverage move already computed), the Execute lands a receipt; this piece adds only the missing Plan seam between temporal's read and the overnight runner's next-story. Acceptance (§10): a fixture log/probe-state yields the expected next done-line; a converged-or-stuck fixture makes it refuse to advance (the stop signal, not a fabricated step); after a synthetic receipt lands, a re-run's derivation changes accordingly. Its done-line is written before the build (§9.4). Probe P1.

A read-only sensor that reads a real data surface (downloads / file types / headers / metadata) into citable evidence — path + header/timestamp substring, never prose. DO NOT double-build (§10): the citation/ghost discipline IS causality/term_economy.py (evidence is file:line or a record substring; no evidence, no mint; a citation that resolves to nothing is a ghost) — this piece reuses that refusal on a new corpus (the person's data instead of the repo's vocabulary). Acceptance: each evidence record carries a resolvable citation; an unresolvable citation is refused as a ghost. Probe P2.

pieces.status: wave 2 — proposed bounded runs (the world as a tree)
pieces.glue: A fold that clusters cited evidence into PROPOSED bounded-run candidates, each carrying its slots: declared-purpose (mission/vision/values), anima/tempo, control-surface — marked proposed, never minted. DO NOT double-build (§10): the bounded-composing-environment model is the repo's own @/@@ CLAUDE.md composition; the anima/tempo slot is epic.the-field's anima arc (loop/energy.py, loop/impact.py grain); a candidate is a Causality-surface node (epic.causality-surface), not a second graph engine. Purpose and anima are DECLARED-INPUT placeholders the person confirms (D-4), never values the fold infers (the machine must not tell the person who they are). Acceptance: fold over sample evidence → ≥1 candidate marked proposed; a candidate with no resolvable backing is refused. Probe P3.

Given a bounded-run candidate, pre-stage a REVERSIBLE control surface autonomously (no gesture) and gate every irreversible/outward act behind a gesture. DO NOT double-build (§10): the blast-radius/reversibility classifier is the Risk pan of the anima arc (the assay schema, epic.the-field); the gesture seam is bdo's standing 'human acts by gesture' discipline and the virtual-request-node form (epic.causality-surface, atom.virtual-request-node.v0). Acceptance: a reversible pre-stage runs with no gesture; an irreversible act is blocked with a legible reason. This is where 'so I don't have to worry' is made safe — autonomy on the reversible, gesture on the irreversible. Probe P4.

pieces.status: wave 4 — the harvest line; teeth leave a mark (bdo, 2026-06-16)
pieces.glue: The precondition for farming a stopping point: the teeth must leave a mark. Today loopmaker's Stop, cited_sensor's ghost, and reversibility_gate's block all return/print and vanish — a meteor that burns up, no meteorite. This records each firing as a foldable signal on an append-only stream (.ai-native/log/signals.jsonl), reusing reconcile.append_line/short_hash (§10, not a new mechanism): content-hashed for idempotence, torn-tail tolerant, absent-stream-empty. A recorded firing lands as state 'seed' (raw potential). The pure classify/fold functions stay pure; the mark is added at the operation seam. Without this the harvest farms an empty field. Probe P6.

pieces.status: wave 4 — the harvest line; where seed is banked, not planted
pieces.glue: The seed bank: a proposed-tier patterns surface, reusing loop/tags.py's proposed→admitted discipline (no new mechanism, §10). A harvested generative shape is banked as 'proposed' — seen, recorded, but NOT minted; 'a seed is not automatically planted.' Planting (promotion to a real Pattern Commons entry) is a deliberate admission (D-4), like admit_tag. No Pattern Commons is homed in ontum today (only the separate experience-foundry); this homes the seed bank as the proposed pool. Probe P7.

pieces.status: wave 4 — the harvest line; the stopping point becomes a harvest
pieces.glue: The creative move at a Stop (bdo, 2026-06-16: 'if a loop maker hits a stopping point they should be creative'). On a Stop it folds the recorded signals and sorts by GENERATIVITY: thresh → grain of insight (consumed now: a stated learning + the next concrete increment, via the gaps.py grain) and bank → proposed seed (a generative shape held in the seed bank). The §10 teeth guard the transitions (meteor→meteorite): refuse to auto-plant a seed (planting is deliberate, D-4), refuse to bank a one-off as seed (noise), refuse to consume a generative shape as mere grain (seed eaten). HORIZON (not this piece): autonomous planting — once the full loop is prepared and trusted, an in-fence seed self-plants, the bounded auto-admit fence pattern (PR #163) applied to the Commons; out-of-fence still needs a gesture. Probe P8; autonomous-plant is a later, fenced probe.

pieces.status: wave 3 — graded by adoption (dormant until the slice exists)
pieces.glue: A use-trace that grades a pre-staged surface by whether it is USED in preference to the alternative; an ignored guess records a miss that bends the model. DO NOT double-build (§10): use-trace grading is the outcomes/ realization measure (outcome probes resolve against a use-trace on the log, not the artifact). Acceptance: a use-trace record shows adoption; an ignored pre-stage records a miss; rendering is never counted as use. Probe P5 (realization; dormant until P1–P4).
